args.query: SELECT Patents_info, cpc, citation FROM publicationinfo WHERE citation IS NOT NULL AND citation <> '[]' AND citation <> '' LIMIT 2000;

result.preview: "No results found in the provided publication_database sample: none of the non\u2013UNIV CALIFORNIA assignees\u2019 citation lists referenced a publication number that appears among patents assigned to UNIV CALIFORNIA in this dataset, so there are no citing-assignee / primary-CPC-subclass-title pairs to report from the available data."

args.answer: No results found in the provided publication_database sample: none of the non–UNIV CALIFORNIA assignees’ citation lists referenced a publication number that appears among patents assigned to UNIV CALIFORNIA in this dataset, so there are no citing-assignee / primary-CPC-subclass-title pairs to report from the available data.

val_args.answer: No results found in the provided publication_database sample: none of the non–UNIV CALIFORNIA assignees’ citation lists referenced a publication number that appears among patents assigned to UNIV CALIFORNIA in this dataset, so there are no citing-assignee / primary-CPC-subclass-title pairs to report from the available data.
